title: Vizion Reference
description: A Vizion container tracking subscription (reference) with status, metadata, and callback configuration.

id.description: Unique reference identifier assigned by Vizion.

container_id.description: The container identification number being tracked.

carrier_scac.description: SCAC carrier code for the tracking subscription.

active.description: Whether the reference is currently active and receiving tracking updates.

callback_url.description: Webhook endpoint for real-time update delivery.

last_update_status.description: Status of the most recent update delivery attempt.

created_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp when the reference was created.

updated_at.description: ISO 8601 timestamp of the last update.
